title: Minimal recurrent motif (sb1 rs2 g0.18) – non-record submission
author: megnat05-tmm

data.description: Uses a single shared block reused across recurrent steps to build larger effective structure without explicit depth.
Structural reuse / recurrent motif design to generate extended representations from a compact operator.

novel_contributions: Single shared block reused across steps
Structural reuse to improve compression under the 16MB constraint
